text.title: Ideation Methods: SCAMPER, Mind Mapping, Starbursting Decision Tree
text.summary: Routes by observable signal to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: goal == variants or connections or scoping?

text.example: goal=variants → conclusion scamper-7-lenses-all → SCAMPER worksheet with 7 lenses filled.
